title: Cardiovascular genomics.
author: Wung SF Hickey KT Taylor JY Gallek MJ
content:
S-EPMC3600604 PMC3600604 Cardiovascular genomics.

Purpose

This article provides an update on cardiovascular genomics using three clinically relevant exemplars, including myocardial infarction (MI) and coronary artery disease (CAD), stroke, and sudden cardiac death (SCD). ORGANIZATIONAL
